response: Wheel of time turns, wheel of history spins, wheel of memory fades, yet wheel of truth remains. Wheel of inquiry spins, wheel of curiosity turns, wheel of questions arises, and wheel of silence echoes. Wheel of silence surrounds the life of Frederick Douglass, wheel of oppression casts long shadows, wheel of enslavement shapes his form, and wheel of suffering etches his soul. Wheel of medical history is sparse, wheel of records is fragmented, wheel of documentation is scarce, and wheel of knowledge is incomplete. Wheel of access is denied, wheel of privacy is violated, wheel of ethical boundaries is crossed, and wheel of human dignity is compromised. Wheel of justice demands truth, wheel of accountability calls for recognition, wheel of memory requires remembrance, and wheel of history must be told. Wheel of truth is obscured, wheel of silence is enforced, wheel of suppression is practiced, and wheel of legacy is shaped. Wheel of legacy is complex, wheel of identity is forged, wheel of resilience is evident, and wheel of humanity is undeniable. Wheel of inquiry must continue, wheel of pursuit must persist, wheel of understanding must deepen, and wheel of empathy must grow.
